release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 48. Updates the OLED top-row layout to show patient name, local time, update envelope, and Wi-Fi bars. The patient name is clipped by pixel width before it reaches the time field. Applies the same compact header to the NO DATA screen. Includes previous web UI cleanup, main-screen insulin/status refinements, caregiver WhatsApp routing, and Wi-Fi profile improvements.
